name: navigate_step
description: Navigate the visible recipe reference marker. Use this when the user asks to go next, back, previous, repeat, or to a specific step number.

direction.description: Navigation direction. Use one of: next, previous, back, repeat. If the user asks for a specific step, use repeat and provide step_number.

step_number.description: Optional 1-based step number when the user says things like 'go to step 3'.

name: timer_control
description: Control named cooking timers. Use this when the user asks to start, set, pause, resume, stop, cancel, or check a timer.

action.description: Timer action. Must be one of: start, set, pause, resume, toggle, stop, cancel, status.

label.description: Optional timer label. Prefer a context-specific label from the current cooking action, such as bake, simmer, pasta, sauce, chicken, rice, oven, or resting. Avoid generic labels like timer unless the user explicitly says that.

duration_seconds.description: Timer duration in seconds. Required for start/set when duration is known.

minutes.description: Timer duration in minutes if easier to infer from the user request.

name: adapt_current_step
description: Record a live cooking adjustment for the current session when the user's real kitchen situation changes. Use this for missing ingredients, substitutions, burned/overcooked/undercooked food, timing changes, equipment limits, or improvisations. This does not edit the saved recipe.

title.description: Short label for the adjustment, such as 'No chicken available' or 'Sauce is reducing too fast'.

note.description: Short practical cooking adjustment to remember for this session.

step_number.description: Optional 1-based visible step marker this adjustment relates to. Omit to attach it to the current visible marker.

name: finish_cooking
description: End the hands-free cooking copilot session. Use this when the user says they are done cooking, finished, wants to exit, stop hands-free mode, or end the conversation.
